basics.name: Win Htaik Aung
basics.label: Software Engineer @ EzySign
basics.summary:
Software engineer with 9 years of industry experience and currently working with  React.js with redux for frontend development. For back end currently working with Golang.

Proficient in object-oriented design, data structures, problem solving, complexity analysis, and debugging. Produce clean, maintainable and testable code with various testing approaches.

I love python but I am willing to pick up new languages as I believe language is a presentation syntax for what we want to do.

I would love to discuss about my experiences with you.Please feel free to reach me at winhtaikaung28@hotmail.com for quick chat .

work.summary:
Maintain and develop existing android app and develop whitelabled apps for customers. 
Develop microsites using liquid template engine and Single Page Applications(SPA) with React -redux. 
Cooperate with backend developers to design the API.
Deliver fully tested native apps via Crashlytics Beta and upload to PlayStore.
Discuss and Share knowledge About DHIS2 Android Sdk

Designing web page

Creating client side mvc application with Angular.js

Creating dynamic map with Ajax & leaflet.js

Develop E-commerce Website with ASP.net MVC 2 and C#.
Create database Store procedures in MSSQL and administration of database.
Crafting user Interface for both admin panel and client side with jquery and bootstrap.
Testing and bug fixing on demand.

Create Database Modules with SQL Server 2005,
Create Store Procedure,Triggers,CURSOR,
Create Program Modules with VB.6.0 & VB.net

education.studyType: International Advance Diploma in Computer Studies

references.name: Razeem Habeeb Mohamed
references.reference: Win in one individual who uniquely stands out among other peers. During our time together, I have seen him displayed great talents in full stack software development. It’s not just his technical skills that impress me, however he is joy to work with and easy going. His can-do attitude and team-building skills were also necessary and valued not just by myself, but by his peers, who often relied on him to get the job done. Win is charismatic, creative and confident.

references.name: William Afendy
references.reference:
I had the pleasure of working with Win for 9 months, collaborating on couple of projects. He was a good all around polyglot developer, a rare find I must say. His only weakness was his tummy. Do not let this man go hungry, he needs all the energy to power his brain.  

Win was very dedicated to his work. Not only he had a positive attitude, but also a passion to produce high quality work. 

Win would be a great asset to any team. A wonderful team player, could be potentially a great team leader one day.

references.name: Warren Woo
references.reference:
Win Htaik Aung is an extremely humble yet talented engineer; whose versatility and range of front-end technologies made it possible for Perx to deliver enterprise-grade progressive web apps (PWAs) that both surprise-and-delight clients and their end-users.

During the time we were working together, I have always admired Win's passion and dedication towards continuous learning - picking up DevOps, Kubernetes, and functional programming - as well as, taking the opportunity to coach and mentor younglings in the agile ways-of-working.

If Win's past performance is any indication of his future prospects, I am certain that Win will definitely be an invaluable asset to whomever he chooses to ply his trade with.

references.name: Bruce Wang
references.reference:
In any roles he is given, he often gives a lot more beyond his defined role. Win is one of the most adaptable developer I have worked with. He went from a junior role working on large RDBMS system in a bank, to an Android developer. When we wind down our mobile apps operation in Perx, he switched to be a hybrid mobile app developer subsequently a React front end developer. In 90seconds, he was picking up enough DevOps knowledge to deal with kubernetes development. So when our last dedicated DevOps left the company, win was incredibly helpful in handling all the DevOps related work. 

His maturity and versality are great for the business. He is always considerate when it comes to engineering approach which makes him one of the easiest developer to work with great pleasure. I’m certainly looking forward to work together with him again in the future.

references.name: Huy Hoàng Phạm
references.reference:
Win is an excellent engineer to have on the team. Not only he has strong technical skills in Rails and ReactJS, but he also has good soft-skills. He is diligent, good attention to details, and the team can count on him to get the works done. Win also knows how to cooperate with stakeholders, designers, and product managers. 
Aside from his works, he also spends time mentoring junior members of the team, to get them up to speed and increase the team's productivity. Personally-wise, Win is very friendly, helpful and fun to work with. I would strongly recommend Win to any team that wants a dedicated and friendly member for their team.
